acceptedAnswer.text: Nabil Thange is a full-stack developer based in Mumbai, India, specializing in React, Next.js, and AI-powered web applications. He is the winner of HackHazards 2025 with NbAIl (AI voice assistant) and creator of Gitskinz (GitHub profile generator used globally). Nabil graduated from Saraswati College of Engineering in Kharghar, Navi Mumbai with a degree in Computer Engineering.
